login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your information to create an account
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

twoFactorChallenge.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactorChallenge.description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
twoFactorChallenge.recoveryDescription: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.addressDescription: Required for purchases. Provide your address and at least one contact method.
profile.resendLink: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.deleteAccountDescription: Delete your account and all of its resources
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

password.title: Password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the LAN ecosystem. Your selection is propagated to all connected Lan* apps.
language.label: Display language

settings.manageDescription: Manage your profile and account settings

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your two-factor authentication and active sessions

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
twoFactor.setupDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the following QR code with your authenticator app and enter the generated code.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesDescription: Store these recovery codes in a secure password manager. They can be used to recover access to your account if you lose your two-factor device.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters

banner.title: We respect your privacy
banner.description: We use cookies that are strictly necessary for the site to work. With your consent we also use privacy-friendly analytics (Plausible) to understand how the site is used. You can withdraw your consent at any time via the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are required to operate the site. They include the session cookie, CSRF protection, your language choice and the sidebar state. They cannot be switched off.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly, cookieless analytics via Plausible to measure aggregate usage (page views, referrers, devices). No personal data, no cross-site tracking.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.empty: Imprint content has not been configured yet.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.empty: The privacy policy has not been published yet.

help.askForHelpTooltip: Open a support ticket in LanHelp

shop.title: Shop
shop.noTicketsAvailable: No tickets available at this time.
shop.addonRequiresTicket: Can only be purchased in combination with a ticket.
shop.loginToPurchase: Please log in to purchase tickets.
shop.noEventsDescription: There are currently no events with tickets available for purchase.
shop.redirectNotice: You will be redirected to complete payment.
shop.emptyCartDescription: Browse our ticket shop and add items to your cart.

checkoutSuccess.title: Order Confirmed
checkoutSuccess.heading: Order Confirmed!
checkoutSuccess.description: Your tickets have been purchased successfully. You can manage them from your tickets page.

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.description: Manage your owned, managed, and assigned tickets
tickets.noOwned: You don't own any tickets yet.
tickets.noManaged: You don't manage any tickets yet.
tickets.noAssigned: You haven't been assigned any tickets yet.
